ClientSideComponent.Name: CVTech2 Dashboard
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"6d8292f3-bfeb-4d5d-8968-6d51a0811eca","alias":"CvTech2DashboardWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"0.1.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart","SharePointFullPage"],"supportsThemeVariants":true,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"1df6b71f-5d0f-4c30-ae0b-b5fd425c2f01","group":{"default":"Business"},"title":{"default":"CVTech2 Dashboard"},"description":{"default":"Native SPFx dashboard web part for the CVTech2 SharePoint site."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"BIDashboard","properties":{"brandLabel":"cvtech2","greetingName":"Mario","profileInitials":"MC","overviewLabel":"3 months overview","languagePrimary":"English","languageSecondary":"Francais","primaryColor":"#27c2c6","secondaryColor":"#136d70","accentTextColor":"#16323a","surfaceColor":"#f3f7fb"}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"cvtech2-dashboard-web-part","scriptResources":{"cvtech2-dashboard-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"cvtech2-dashboard-web-part.js"},"react":{"type":"component","id":"0d910c1c-13b9-4e1c-9aa4-b008c5e42d7d","version":"17.0.1"},"react-dom":{"type":"component","id":"aa0a46ec-1505-43cd-a44a-93f3a5aa460a","version":"17.0.1"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.21.1"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.21.1"}}}}
